name: VaultSparkStudios.github.io
currentFocus: Session 79 is closed out: the premium proof/depth pass is now live in the shared trust-depth layer on homepage, membership, and VaultSparked; world-gravity rails now extend onto the key game and universe pages with per-world affinity inference; and the local browser verification contract is documented explicitly in docs/LOCAL_VERIFY.md. The next focus is extending the stronger proof language beyond the three core conversion pages, strengthening the main games/universe hubs as route orchestrators, and keeping the scheduled Genius Hit List audit active.
nextMilestone: Carry the stronger proof/depth language onto the next high-intent public routes, deepen gravity on the /games/ and /universe/ hub pages, and keep the periodic Genius Hit List audit running while the standing infrastructure blockers remain human-owned.
blockers: CF_WORKER_API_TOKEN missing, so Worker deploys still require local Wrangler auth
Annual Stripe plan keys still do not exist, so annual checkout remains an honest preview only
